content:
Column Introduction This column is a collection of preparation materials for the Blue Bridge Cup MCU Design and Development Competition, based on the CT107D development board (IAP15F2K61S2 MCU).
The content covers the following modules:
Basic Modules LED control Independent buttons & matrix keyboard Digital tube display (static/dynamic) Timer & interrupt system Extended Modules DS1302 Real-time clock DS18B20 Temperature sensor PCF8591 ADC/DAC AT24C02 EEPROM storage Ultrasonic ranging module NE555 Frequency measurement Comprehensive Practice UART serial communication PWM output control Past provincial/national exam analysis Competition code templates & tips Continuously updated, stay tuned!
title: Blue Bridge Cup MCU Column - Competition Preparation Guide

content:
Introduction This is a complete guide to the STM32 clock tree.
The clock system is the core of STM32. Understanding the clock tree is crucial for embedded development. This guide will help you deeply understand STM32 clock configuration.
Contents Clock Sources (HSI, HSE, LSI, LSE) PLL Configuration Details System Clock Selection Bus Clock Prescalers Peripheral Clock Enable Practical Configuration Examples View Full Tutorial 👉 Click here to view the full tutorial
title: STM32 Clock Tree Complete Guide

content:
Introduction This is a CH32V30x RISC-V MCU learning guide designed for 8051 developers.
If you have experience with 8051 MCU development and want to transition to RISC-V architecture, this guide will help you quickly get started with the CH32V30x series.
Contents RISC-V Architecture Overview CH32V30x Series Introduction Migration Guide from 8051 to RISC-V Development Environment Setup Practical Examples View Full Tutorial 👉 Click here to view the full tutorial
title: CH32V30x Guide - From 8051 to RISC-V

content:
Introduction This is a quick start guide to digital circuits, designed specifically for beginners learning 51 microcontrollers.
If you’re learning MCU programming but struggling with digital circuit basics, this guide will help you quickly master the essential knowledge.
Contents Digital circuit fundamentals Logic gates Combinational logic circuits Sequential logic circuits 51 MCU applications View Full Tutorial 👉 Click here to view the full tutorial
title: Digital Circuit Quick Start Guide
